title: selaginella conferta
intro: Selaginella conferta, also known as Spikemoss, is a species of evergreen, perennial plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in Asia, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Selaginella conferta include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and alleviate symptoms of digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tonics, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
